data.content: Implemented beat ID search across backends and tests. Search now matches full IDs, suffix matches, and aliases; the beats page omits the state filter when q is present so ID search can find beats in any state. Validation in /private/tmp/foolery-1789-impl: bun run lint (warnings only, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Branch: work/foolery-1789. Commit: 51a59f081418.
